name: boltz-api-cli
description: Predict structures, screen molecules and proteins, and design binders.

interface.shortDescription: Predict structures, screen molecules and proteins, and design binders
interface.longDescription: Use Boltz from Codex for biomolecular modeling workflows: predict structure and binding for protein, RNA, DNA, and ligand complexes; rank small-molecule or protein libraries against targets; and design novel small molecules, peptides, antibodies, nanobodies, or custom protein binders with structures and confidence metrics.
defaultPrompt: Predict EGFR L858R binding to osimertinib
Design nanobodies for a SARS-CoV-2 RBD epitope
Design selective JAK2 binders from Enamine REAL
